summary: Iteration 103: P0 Bug Fix Testing - Private Paddy Purchase entries in Cash Book Cash Transactions tab and Daily Report Qntl values. Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). All bug fixes verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: reports.py lines 394-397: move-to-pvt correctly sets kg, qntl, final_qntl, quantity_qntl fields
reports.py line 419: move-to-pvt creates cash_transactions with account='cash' (not 'ledger')
private_trading.py line 130: _create_cashbook_diesel_for_pvt_paddy creates pvt_party_jama with account='cash'
daily_report.py line 27: Uses fallback chain final_qntl -> qntl -> quantity_qntl -> 0 for total calculation
daily_report.py lines 159,164: Details use same fallback chain for qntl field
cashbook.py lines 968-979: auto-fix fixes missing final_qntl/qntl fields for agent_extra entries
cashbook.py lines 1002-1007: auto-fix changes pvt_party_jama entries from account='ledger' to account='cash'
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test Private Paddy Purchase entries via API for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fixes for Private Paddy Purchase entries in Cash Book are working. All agent_extra entries now appear in Cash Transactions tab with account='cash'. Daily Report shows correct qntl values using fallback chain.

move_to_pvt_creates_qntl_fields.details: Creates private_paddy entry with kg, qntl, final_qntl, quantity_qntl fields

cash_book_shows_pvt_paddy_entries.details: Returns Pvt Paddy Purchase entries including agent_extra source

auto_fix_handles_agent_extra.details: Fixes missing final_qntl/qntl fields and creates missing cash_transactions entries

daily_report_pvt_paddy_qntl.details: Returns pvt_paddy with correct total_qntl (non-zero) using fallback chain

private_paddy_creates_cash_transaction.details: Creates both paddy entry AND cash_transactions entry

agent_extra_not_skipped.details: agent_extra entries are NOT skipped from cash_transactions creation

root_cause_1_agent_extra_skipped.description: agent_extra entries were being skipped from cash_transactions creation
root_cause_1_agent_extra_skipped.fix: Removed isAgentExtra skip from party jama creation in reports.py and private_trading.py

root_cause_2_missing_qntl_fields.fix: move-to-pvt now sets kg, qntl, final_qntl, quantity_qntl fields

root_cause_3_wrong_account.description: Python backend used account:'ledger' instead of 'cash'
root_cause_3_wrong_account.fix: Changed to account:'cash' in reports.py line 419 and private_trading.py line 130

root_cause_4_daily_report_field_names.description: Daily Report used wrong field names (d.kg instead of d.qntl)
root_cause_4_daily_report_field_names.fix: Uses fallback chain final_qntl -> qntl -> quantity_qntl in daily_report.py
